name_en: !!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️ GG detail wallet. Gucci small leather goods break design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personalized way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with red GG accessories, creating a refined accessory for modern fashion. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, black leather trim, brass hardware with black ceramic finish, cloud print fabric lining with GG details. Inside: 10 card slots, 1 bill compartment.
name_cn:
!!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️ GG detail wallet. Gucci small leather goods break design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personalized way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with red GG accessories, creating a refined accessory for modern fashion. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, black leather trim, brass hardware with black ceramic finish, cloud print fabric lining with GG details. Inside: 10 card slots, 1 bill compartment.
Model: 768243.
Closed size: 11(W) x 9cm(H)
Open size: 21(W) x 9cm(H)
Color: Cognac/Brown PVC.
Made in Italy
Weight: approx. 0.045kg
